content: Just watched Kath’s story, ||who’s really the source of her (fire) power that N mentioned chose Kath? And why did Dexter died next to Kath, didn’t he die stealing Ramona?||
||No that person is not Dexter, Idk why you got that impression. Her god is Kadath sun, yeah literally, aka Cthugha a god that hates N very much.||

||Who do you mean it’s not Dexter? I remember at the end of her story the name Dexter is spelled out as related to the dead investigator. Was I confused that the letter is addressed to Dexter instead?||
Btw where did you get that info about ||Kadath||
||Mythag Investigator died, she took their letter, and Dexter name is on it||
read again
in the tiny lore tidbit in her OST
you can read it here
(they should have included these tidbit ingame 😭 )
||idk if the 4 billion tidbit points to it being our sun vs a sun tbh||
||4 billion is more origin of life than origin of earth||
||it came around the time the earth was born here, so it’s the sun||
Maybe Tohu works that way
who need normal sun when you can have the sun that hates smoke people
||i feel like that's a reach, it could have easily been a visiting alien sun||
my pal they called it the sky-devouring sun
so I called it the sun
||4 billions here is a pretty good choice to showcase that thing already came to Earth since Earth was born ||
beautifully azure world is not the earth to you? isn’t it the most common description of normal earth in fiction?
as far as we know Kath is not an arc 2 unit in lore

||well its since life is born, earth had already been around for half a billion years at that point. it very well could be the sun but i don't think we can say anything definitive with just that statement||
||no i mean it could be another sun visiting/witnessing the earth 4 bil years ago||
||the fact that it knows when Kath died so it could awaken her at that time means it’s still around to me||
and why would it be another?
if it is another one why would they even said it in the tidbit in the firts place
cause the original cthuga is another and kath's wheel references formalhaut
if that sun is not sth connect to Kath at all?
which is where the original cthuga chills
what
pal
isn’t the fact that they don’t spell out the real name is bc of Tohu
why are we having 2 Cthugha now?
what
cthuga is the name of the entity that blesses kath
Kath refers to Formahaul as a palace
not a prison like in the original reference
so why would Morimens Cthugha just stay there all the time?
if Cthugha is not the one visit earth 4 billion years ago then what is the point of including it in Kath OST tidbit?
when we all know Cthugha is her god?
no i'm saying cthuga did visit/influence 4 bil years ago. but its not the normal sun
its another sun from Among The Stars
you confused me
so you are just saying the sun at Kadath right now is not Cthugha
yeah
i mean it could be
but i don't think the 4 bil quote is enough proof
then why would you said it could be another sun visiting earth 😭
cause it would explain why the quote said it saw earth 4 bil years ago
if we use real history here then the real Kadath sun has already there way longer than Kadath
and Cthugha just visit 4 billion years ago
so that is why I don’t understand who could be another sun in this case?
now im confused
i thought you were saying cthuga is kadath's sun
also Aphoom - Zah is pretty much the proof that Cthugha used to visit Kadath
bc that thing is his son
yeah this
so i said that i dont think the 4 bill thing was proof
and im saying kadaths sun is different
okay I agree
now I actually understand what you say
it would be funnier if the sun all this time is not the real sun
do we have anything about the moon?
besides from Herbert lines in chapter 3 or 4 I think
in an ideal world it's a secret giant kaiju
or we get moon cults
there is a moon cult actually
but it somehow tie back to Shub Niggurath so Idk if they want to reheat Thais nachos
is the moon cult on the moon
nope
sadly
Is Aigis power related to nightmare?
no? her ability is to petrify
Oohhh
Do awakener aged?
they dont physically age
but they can still mentally develop
Caro awakeners usually have some ability to manipulate flesh. Aigis turns things to ||candy||. Or stone. I'm unclear on this point. I think she's working on it.
Shes doing her best here
I actually think with Aigis, it's a matter of practice. The only problem with Aigis was ||in her life, she didn't have that kind of time remaining to learn.||
||That, and something was living inside of her eye socket.||
||Sean did try to help, but given that both parties were very confused and had little time to adapt to the situation, its pretty impressive that she managed to control what little she could so far||
Yeah. Unfortunately, not all little wishes are granted.
I'm not sure about the mental development part, tbh. I don't think we've seen a child awakener who has mentally developed past what would be normal for their physical age range
The most mentally mature one is Tulu, but his side story reveals that he was always like that
Ogier, for example, sure doesn't act like someone who is well over a century old. He still acts like the kid he was when he died
||Lily DEFINITELY doesn't act like an adult woman||
Agrippa should be well into adulthood now age-wise, but she still acts like the teenager she was when she died, etc etc
maybe they just dont have the motivation to mature?
kinda like how murphy remained a brat even though she was effecticely 25 (minus stasis)

I imagine it's something like that
As you age you physically change so your mental has to adapt to it

But if you never age, unless faced with immense burden ahead. You won't age mentally either?

Some of them develop skills that they wouldn't ordinarily have, but they don't actually seem to actually develop mentally at all. They're only capable of refining themselves to what they could have been at that age.
Like, Aurita is very stupid in a very indefinite way. Part of the charm, I guess. But it's also the horror aspect of the Awakening.
Agrippa, meanwhile, is less immature and more extremely deranged.
It adds weight to when characters, especially children, die in the story, imo
I got the decay factor of keyflare region: y=\frac{156x}{x+126}
there's some percent error tho, around 0.5, the higher the less error

If they can just be brought back and then grow up normally, at least mentally, that takes away from the gravity of certain moments. But the fact that they'll now forever be frozen like this, robbed of the life they would have had and the person they would have been means that there was, in fact, a price to pay for that revival
corpses don’t grow
It's hard to say what is immaturity and what is just a side effect of being an immortal entity on the precipice of madness
Agrippa is basically lotan with more insecurities
nobody is calling lotan immature
Ehhh
Agrippa's family went out with the darkest story in, well... the story, and then Agrippa was put in the forever box indefinitely, at which point she suddenly wasn't there anymore
granted i havent read agrippa story
She's pretty appropriately batshit insane, all things considered
lets goo
that story was so worth the countdown

yay
